Case Study • Various

How we helped Transpek Earns EcoVadis Gold Medal for Sustainability Excellence

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Transpek Industries Limited, a globally trusted name in chemical manufacturing and a publicly-listed company on India’s capital makets, has been awarded the EcoVadis Gold Medal, marking a significant achievement in its sustainability journey. This distinction places Transpek among the top 5% of companies globally assessed by EcoVadis, the world’s leading sustainability ratings platform.

This major milestone reflects Transpek’s deep-rooted commitment to environmental stewardship, responsible business ethics, and sustainable supply chain practices. The achievement was made possible with the strategic guidance of Growlity, Inc. USA, a global leader in ESG advisory, sustainability consulting, and EcoVadis strategy.

Being a publicly listed company on India’s capital markets, Transpek’s achievement holds even greater significance. The EcoVadis Gold Medal underscores Transpek’s proactive approach to transparency, risk management, and long-term value creation for all stakeholders, including investors.

About Transpek

Established in 1965, Transpek Industries Ltd. specializes in manufacturing chlorinated chemicals, supplying to over 60 countries. Known for its innovation, quality, and ethical practices, Transpek serves diverse sectors including pharmaceuticals, agrochemicals, polymers, and more. Sustainability is a cornerstone of its business strategy, driving positive environmental and social impact across operations.

“Achieving the EcoVadis Gold Medal is a proud moment for Transpek. It is a testament of values imbibed in us by our promoter Mr. Atul G. Shroff for continuous improvement, transparency, and long-term sustainability. We are grateful for the dedicated support from Growlity, who helped us articulate and enhance our ESG initiatives with clarity and precision.”
– Mr. Bimal Mehta, Managing Director, Transpek Industries Ltd

“Our EcoVadis journey was not just about meeting global standards—it was about building a culture of sustainability and accountability across the organization. We’re proud of our team’s collective effort, and we deeply appreciate Growlity’s structured approach and expert guidance throughout the process.”
– Mr. Prashant Vaidya, Vice President – HRM, Transpek Industries Ltd.

About Growlity

Growlity, Inc. USA is a premier sustainability and ESG consulting firm, helping organizations around the globe build resilient and responsible business models. With expertise in EcoVadis assessments, ESG reporting, carbon footprinting, BRSR, LCA, and more, Growlity empowers companies to navigate complex sustainability challenges and improve stakeholder trust.

“Our collaboration with Transpek was built on transparency, strong leadership, and alignment with international best practices. The EcoVadis Gold Medal reflects their seriousness in driving sustainable transformation at every level.”
– Dr. Nitin Dumasia, President & CEO, Growlity, Inc. USA

“This achievement by Transpek demonstrates what’s possible when an organization commits wholeheartedly to ESG excellence. We are honored to support such a forward-thinking team in showcasing their sustainability impact to the world.”
– Mr. Parth Kapadia, Senior ESG Consultant, Growlity, Inc. USA

Transpek’s Gold Medal not only enhances its standing in the global chemical supply chain but also strengthens investor confidence, reinforces its regulatory readiness as a publicly listed entity, and inspires other organizations to invest in their ESG frameworks and sustainability performance. The company now joins an elite group of businesses recognized globally for their positive environmental and social contributions.
